description: Destroys the Provided Instance (Slot) when * (Call) is called.

fields.PreserveAssets: Whether or not the assets associated with the provided Instance (Slot) should stay or be instantly discarded
fields.SendDestroyingEvent: Whether or not to send a destroying event to other nodes like On Destroying
fields.Next: Sends an Impulse after * (Call) is called and Instance (Slot) has been destroyed. will not fire if Instance (Slot) is null.
